_comment: Per-assembly coverage floor enforced by tools/check-coverage.py in CI.
Values are minimums, not targets — see docs/spec/coverage-gate.md.
Bump them upward as new tests land; the gate only fails on a DROP below.
AI                : >= 99% line  ← REPORTED ONLY (see note below)
FlowHub.AI is intentionally absent from the enforced thresholds today.
Coverlet on the GitHub-Actions runner doesn't instrument FlowHub.AI when
its tests live in FlowHub.Web.ComponentTests (transitive-dep tracking
issue we couldn't pin down in the gate-rollout window). Locally `just
test-coverage` reports AI at 100% line, and the AI test PR (#148) is
already merged on main — so we're not losing coverage *signal*, only
*enforcement*. Reported as a follow-up issue; restore the AI threshold
once the CI-vs-local parity is fixed.
